item.title: JavaScript loops benchmark (incl. for/for-of/while/forEach/map)
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Benchmarkhttps://jsben.ch/EAlKw Result CodesExecute before every test1 2 var arr = Array(1000000).fill(null); var dosmth; for - Uncached length1 2 3 for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { dosmth = arr[i]; } for - Cached length1 2 3 for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { dosmth = arr[i]; } for.. of1 2 3 for (let val of arr) { dosmth = val; } while - Uncached length1 2 3 4 5 6 let i = 0; while(i < arr.
